stocks.impact_theory: NVIDIA announced the immediate availability of its next-gen Rubin AI chip architecture, surpassing Blackwell expectations with 50% more efficiency. Economically, this accelerates AI infrastructure spending by hyperscalers like MSFT/AMZN, projecting $200B+ capex in 2026. Market psychology: Triggers FOMO buying amid AI hype cycle. Historical parallel: 2023 Hopper GPU launch sparked 200% rally. Analogies: 1. California Gold Rush frenzy drawing miners (investors). 2. iPhone launch catalyzing app economy explosion.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web searches reveal analyst upgrades from Goldman Sachs/Morgan Stanley targeting $350+; X semantic search (score>0.25) shows 85% positive sentiment on #NVDA #AIchip (20 latest posts dominated by excitement); volume spike 3x avg.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long calls or shares for +12% gain in 3-5 days on momentum breakout.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or small short above $320 with -5% potential if hype fades.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Supply chain delays, US-China trade tensions on chips, valuation bubble burst.

stocks.justification: Overwhelming positive news consensus, high X engagement, historical precedent strong.

stocks.impact_theory: Tesla delayed robotaxi unveil to Q3 2026 due to regulatory hurdles and FSD v13 bugs. Economically, delays cap autonomous revenue projections ($10B+ deferred). Psychology: Erodes cult confidence, triggers profit-taking. Historical: Similar to 2020 Battery Day miss (-20% drop). Analogies: 1. Promised land mirage in desert. 2. Vaporware like Duke Nukem Forever.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Reuters/CNBC reports confirm delay; X keyword search (TSLA robotaxi since:2026-03-23) 70% negative (memes mocking Elon), min_faves:50+ posts amplify doubt.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Dip buy at $200 for +15% rebound if Elon's tweet storm.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short puts or shares targeting -10% to $190 support.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Surprise positive tweet reversal, Q1 delivery beat masking issues.

stocks.justification: Clear negative catalyst but TSLA's volatility/Elon factor adds uncertainty.

stocks.impact_theory: Apple revealed Vision Pro 2 with eye-tracking upgrades and $500 price cut at spring event. Economically, expands spatial computing TAM to $50B by 2028. Psychology: Reinvigorates growth narrative post-iPhone plateau. Historical: AirPods launch boosted wearables 300%. Analogies: 1. iPod nano shrinking form factor revolution. 2. Netflix pivot to streaming dominance.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Bloomberg scoop confirmed; X sentiment 75% bullish (#AppleVisionPro2), web analyst notes upgrade cycle.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long above $250 breakout for +7% to 52w high.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Minimal upside short, -3% if adoption slow.

stocks.justification: Proven product refresh pattern, strong media buzz.

stocks.impact_theory: Azure global outage hit 30% of enterprise users for 6 hours, blamed on Copilot AI overload. Economically, erodes cloud trust, potential $1B churn risk. Psychology: Fear of over-reliance on AI infra. Historical: 2023 CrowdStrike-like incident (-5%). Analogies: 1. Bridge collapse from overload. 2. Titanic hitting reliability iceberg.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Downdetector spikes; X posts rage (#AzureDown 65% negative), analysts flag margin pressure.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy dip at $470 for quick rebound.

stocks.justification: Outages common but scale here notable; recovery likely fast.

stocks.impact_theory: Machinists union strike enters week 2, halting 787/737 production (50 planes/week). Economically, $3B Q2 cash burn projected. Psychology: Reinforces safety/execution doubts. Historical: 2019 MAX crisis (-30%). Analogies: 1. Factory fire halting assembly line. 2. Shipyard workers mutiny.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: WSJ reports stalled talks; X latest 80% bearish (#BoeingStrike), order book erosion fears.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Gov't intervention, Airbus weakness aiding backlog.

stocks.justification: Prolonged strike history predictive, weak fundamentals.
